Nigerian Corporate Affairs Commission
If your company is registered with the Nigerian Corporate Affairs Commission and is required to maintain a CAC Acknowledgement letter, you will be required to provide your CAC Acknowledgement Letter in a subsequent form.
Is your company registered with the Nigerian Corporate Affairs Commission?
Please select from the following reasons your company is exempt from registering with the Corporate Affairs Commission.
The company is a foreign company and has been invited by any tier of government for specific individual projects
The company is a foreign company executing specific individual loan projects on behalf of a donor country or international organisation.
The company is a foreign government-owned companies engaged solely in export promotion activities.
The company is a foreign engineering consultant or technical experts engaged in specialist projects with any tier of government.
Please explain why your company is exempt from registering with the Corporate Affairs Commission.
